esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// liveness_heartbeatfailures is a counter; any increase indicates node losing liveness
| WHERE metrics.liveness_heartbeatfailures IS NOT NULL AND metrics.liveness_heartbeatfailures > 0
| STATS failures = MAX(metrics.liveness_heartbeatfailures)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id
| SORT failures DESC
